text_raw: What if he comes down to the village...?
text_clean: What if he comes down to the village...?

text_raw: Goodness... A hyena called Skevald has been attacking travelers.
text_clean: Goodness... A hyena called Skevald has been attacking travelers.

text_raw: We ought to tell the young ones not to wander beyond the village...
text_clean: We ought to tell the young ones not to wander beyond the village...

text_raw: That wretched beast hasn't been seen in quite a while...
text_clean: That wretched beast hasn't been seen in quite a while...

text_raw: Did you really slay that beast?
text_clean: Did you really slay that beast?

text_raw: He's the reason everyone was penned in town.
text_clean: He's the reason everyone was penned in town.

text_raw: At last, our lives can return to normal.
text_clean: At last, our lives can return to normal.

text_raw: His fall means we can finally move our goods freely.
text_clean: His fall means we can finally move our goods freely.

text_raw: Here's the reward, as promised.
text_clean: Here's the reward, as promised.

text_raw: I hear you're the one who dealt with Skevald.
text_clean: I hear you're the one who dealt with Skevald.

text_raw: Thank you, you did some fine work!
text_clean: Thank you, you did some fine work!

text_raw: Should we ready the coin for the bounty?
text_clean: Should we ready the coin for the bounty?

text_raw: His den was completely cleared out.
text_clean: His den was completely cleared out.

text_raw: We owe you our lives, thank you.
text_clean: We owe you our lives, thank you.

text_raw: I promise, I'll get it back for you...
text_clean: I promise, I'll get it back for you...

text_raw: You look like a skilled swordsman... Could you help me out?
text_clean: You look like a skilled swordsman... Could you help me out?

text_raw: A few days ago, my daughter and I ran into Skevald.
text_clean: A few days ago, my daughter and I ran into Skevald.

text_raw: We barely escaped with our lives...
text_clean: We barely escaped with our lives...

text_raw: But she lost her beloved doll... it was a... keepsake from her late mother.
text_clean: But she lost her beloved doll... it was a... keepsake from her late mother.

text_raw: I know we should be grateful just to have survived, but she hasn't stopped crying.
text_clean: I know we should be grateful just to have survived, but she hasn't stopped crying.

text_raw: If you happen to find it, could you... could you bring it to me?
text_clean: If you happen to find it, could you... could you bring it to me?

text_raw: Mmm?
text_clean: Mmm?

text_raw: Dad! My doll! It's gone!
text_clean: Dad! My doll! It's gone!

text_raw: My doll!
text_clean: My doll!

text_raw: Hey. Come now... Maybe some sweets'll cheer you up?
text_clean: Hey. Come now... Maybe some sweets'll cheer you up?

text_raw: Hey... Why don't we go find something fun to do?
text_clean: Hey... Why don't we go find something fun to do?

text_raw: How could I make her smile again...?
text_clean: How could I make her smile again...?

text_raw: This...! This is the very doll my daughter lost!
text_clean: This...! This is the very doll my daughter lost!

text_raw: Thank you, thank you! This'll put a smile back on her face.
text_clean: Thank you, thank you! This'll put a smile back on her face.

text_raw: I am deeply grateful. I shall never forget your kindness.
text_clean: I am deeply grateful. I shall never forget your kindness.
